headline: Vistra Expands Texas VPP With Enphase As Valuation Signals Upside Potential
summary: Vistra (NYSE:VST) expanded its residential virtual power plant program in Texas by integrating Enphase Energy's IQ Batteries into its Battery Rewards offering. The expansion allows participating homeowners to export stored power to the grid during select periods to support grid stability. Participants receive financial incentives in return for allowing Vistra to access a portion of their battery capacity at times of high demand. For you as an investor, this move highlights how Vistra is...
